note: Live Groq validation using the key already stored in Windows Credential Manager. The key value was never printed, logged, or written to any file/evidence; only booleans and transcription metrics were captured. The 20s audio clip used for the transcription test was extracted read-only from an existing lecture's already-extracted audio and deleted afterward.

step2_transcription.comparison: Both online modes returned coherent, identical English text for the clip; Online Fast (turbo) was ~2.9x faster wall-time than Online Accurate on this 20s sample. No secret appeared in any output; GroqError messages are provider-scrubbed of the key by design.
